query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'business_positions' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%salary%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%compensation%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'business_positions' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%salary%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%compensation%';
